verses.text: Khuakhal sungin galsimin kumpite kuankhia zel uh hi. Tua bang hunhoih khuakhal hong tun' ciangin Joab in galkapte kuan khiatpihin Ammon mite' gam sugawp a, hong pai-in Rabbah khua umcih hi. Ahih hangin Jerusalem-ah David om hi. Tua ciangin Joab in Rabbah khua vatin lumlet hi

Tua ciangin David in amau' kumpipa' kumpi lukhu ama tung panin lakkhiatsak hi. Tua lukhu kham talen khat gikin a sungah suangmanpha khat a omna amah in thei hi. Tua hi a, David in tua lukhu ama lu tungah khu hi. Tua ciangin amah in tua khuapi van kinusiate tampi tak khat paikhiatpih hi

Tua ciangin amah in tua sunga om mite paikhiatpihin singatnate leh tuzumte leh heite tawh na a sem dingin a koih hi. Tua bangin Ammon mite' khuapite khempeuhah David in hih hi. Tua ciangin David leh mi khempeuh Jerusalem-ah a ciah uh hi.
Hih thute khit ciangin Gezer-ah Filistia mite tawh kidona hong om a, Hushah khuami Sibbekai in mithagolte' suanlekhakte khat ahi Sippai a that hi. Tua bangin Filistia mite kinuaisiah hi
Tua ciangin Filistia mite tawh kidona omkik leuleu hi. Tua hi a, Jair' tapa Elhanan in a teipi kung siamlawngpi cia a pha, Gath khuami Goliath' sanggampa Lahmi a that hi

Tua ciangin a khut langtuakah khutme guk a nei, a khe langtuakah zong kheme guk mah a nei, a vekpi-in sawmnihleli a nei, mi thalian khat a omna Gath-ah gal omkik hi. Tua mipa zong mithagolte' sung pana hong piang ahi hi
Amah in Israel a to ciangin David' sanggampa Shimea' tapa Jonathan in amah that hi
Hih mi thumte pen Gath-a mithagolte sung pana hong piang ahi uh hi. David leh a nasemte' khutin amaute puk uh hi.
